description: Explore feed candidate taxonomy. Declares the curated sources, topic tags, and card types that compose the single ranked content pane, plus the editorial cold-start order an anonymous/zero-signal user sees. The feed ranks these candidates through the SAME PCSF leaderboard used for model routing (rankCandidates(cards, 'explore', opts)); click=success, dwell=latency, dismiss=failure are recorded via recordModelOutcome(card.key, 'explore', ...). No new recommender subsystem — one mechanism, two consumers. See docs/research/explore-content-machine.md §8.

key_namespaces.source:: Leaderboard agentId scored per content origin (e.g. 'source:Simon Willison'). PRIMARY key for v1.0 — each card's key = 'source:' + card.source.

notes: default_priority is the editorial cold-start ranking: a zero-signal user sees Keystone's own build activity first, then taste-maker reads, then watch/belief/doc. Once the leaderboard has 'explore' outcomes for a source key, rankCandidates reorders by learned compositeScore and this editorial order only breaks ties (then card freshness).
